title: Codex Stop Hook Input
description: Stdin JSON payload for Stop hooks in Codex. Includes stop_hook_active and last_assistant_message.

transcript_path.description: Path to the session transcript (may be null).

cwd.description: Working directory of the Codex agent.

turn_id.description: Identifier for the current conversation turn.

stop_hook_active.description: Whether the stop hook is actively processing.

last_assistant_message.description: The last message from the assistant before stop.
